# Mrjan Field

**Summary**: A field located in the Arabian Gulf region.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-murif|Murif, 2023]] conducted field studies and validation at the mrjan--field.

## Key Findings From This Location

- The advisory system was tested on several drilling runs in the Arab Reservoir of the MRJN Field, achieving high ROP values (up to 77.79 fph). ([[2023-murif|Murif, 2023, p. 218]])
